reviews.comment:
El servicio es básico, hacen lo básico y si no lo pedis... (a veces se molestan) te atienden como si te hicieran un favor... Y uno es socio!!! PAGA!!!! una cuota bastante onerosa...

(Translated by Google)
The service is basic; they do the bare minimum, and if you don't ask for it (sometimes they get annoyed), they treat you like they're doing you a favor. And you're a member! You pay! A rather hefty fee...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwb2NlZi13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la cafetería del Automóvil Club, buena atención, buenos precio, buen Cafe, las medias lunas no son buenas para mi gusto. La limpieza del lugar excelente. Gracias

(Translated by Google)
The Automobile Club's cafeteria is very good: good service, good prices, and good coffee. The croissants aren't my favorite. The place is excellently clean. Thank you.
